name: Shatterizer Replacement Top
summary: These are the authorized Shatterizer Vaporiser replacement tops, made from either glass or aluminium for easy hand washing.
description: These are the authorized Shatterizer Vaporiser replacement tops, made from either glass or aluminium for easy hand washing. The aluminium tops are also extra durable. Choose from black or silver aluminium, or glass options. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
